title: santalum austrocaledonicum
intro: Santalum austrocaledonicum, also known as the New Caledonian sandalwood, is a species of sandalwood tree native to the island of New Caledonia. This tree is valued for its fragrant heartwood, which is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Santalum austrocaledonicum include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. The heartwood of this tree is used in various herbal preparations, including essential oils, powders, and capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
